status: Woogi Harness compact Korean typography catalog
source_note: Built from official font/source URLs and inspired by the public Korean Vibe Fonts package. The upstream package had no LICENSE file visible when this catalog was created, so this is a compact rewrite rather than a vendored copy.
license_note: commercial_status is a practical screening field, not legal advice. Verify the official license_url before client launch, redistribution, or self-hosting.

fonts.name: Pretendard Variable
fonts.commercial_status: commercial-friendly; verify OFL terms before redistribution
fonts.family_body: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
fonts.family_heading: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
fonts.fit: Modern Korean UI baseline for apps, landing pages, portfolios, and product docs.
fonts.avoid: Weak when the surface needs a deliberately literary, poster, or handmade voice.

fonts.name: NanumSquare Neo
fonts.commercial_status: commercial-friendly; do not resell the font itself
fonts.family_body: "NanumSquareNeo", "NanumSquare Neo", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
fonts.fit: Confident Korean headings for startup, fintech, AI, and brand-forward product pages.
fonts.avoid: Long quiet reading and soft handwritten moods.

fonts.name: Spoqa Han Sans Neo
fonts.commercial_status: commercial-friendly; verify upstream license before redistribution
fonts.family_body: "Spoqa Han Sans Neo", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
fonts.family_heading: "Spoqa Han Sans Neo", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
fonts.fit: Product interfaces where Korean labels, numbers, and dense UI have to stay calm.

fonts.commercial_status: commercial-friendly; verify OFL terms before redistribution

fonts.family_heading: "Goorm Sans", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
fonts.fit: Developer products, technical portfolios, and clean Korean app UIs.

fonts.family_body: "IBM Plex Sans KR", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
fonts.family_heading: "IBM Plex Sans KR", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif
fonts.fit: B2B dashboards, data products, and technical documentation with a calm engineered tone.

fonts.family_heading: "Noto Sans KR", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic", sans-serif

fonts.avoid: Surfaces needing a distinct brand voice.
